name: Microsoft Threat Modeling Tool
description: STRIDE-based threat-modeling tool from Microsoft. Tool: https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/security/develop/threat-modeling-tool. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #186 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Microsoft Threat Modeling Tool output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Microsoft Threat Modeling Tool output file to parse instead of running it live.
